title: Fungal Hyphae as Distributed Hygroscopic Vapor Sinks
description: Analysis code, processed data, and figure generation scripts for: Fungal Hyphae as Distributed Hygroscopic Vapor Sinks. Includes hydrogel calibration experiments (20 trials), fungal tracking pipelines (15 trials), wheat stripe rust (RSR) leaf condensation analysis (6 leaves), and Kaplan-Meier survival analysis of droplet lifetimes.
notes: Raw microscopy images and ilastik probability maps are archived on Zenodo (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18968891). Processed CSVs sufficient to reproduce all figures are included in this repository.
